creator: yuripv@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mina Galić from comment #6)
Given that linux shows the same value for class (00), I don't think there's much that can be done in FreeBSD (other than may be saying "unclassified" instead of "old"?).  Probably this should be reported to hypervisor upstream with a request to use some assigned class/subclass?  E.g. bhyve uses the "encryption controller" for virtio-rng.
